title: Elytra HUD
description: Adds the Elytra durability in the HUD, so you don't risk to fall while in the air
body:
**_Elytra HUD_**
---
**Also compatible with [Elytra Slot](https://modrinth.com/mod/elytra-slot)** _(Only for **1.20-1.20.1** and **1.21-1.21.1**)_

This simple mod adds the remaining durability percent in the HUD while using elytra.

![Remaining durability](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a0e1369ce727a820ccbee75a1cd49cc79b3fba52.png)

While you are flying, if the durability falls below 4.6% _(Around 20 seconds of flight time remaining)_, a message appears to warn that the Elytra is about to break.

![Low durability message](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2618fc353a3c7badd62de83dfea64fe428b732d9.png)

To edit the config [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) is required.

HUD config:
![HUD config](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/68acde6b1b53a5f45007e5af767518219fd1ece0.png)

Low durability message config:
![Low durability message config](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f7d846474467cf1b8fb43058026e68abdf8494de.png)
